Lyrics.text:
Endrey ambony loatra
Tsy tratry ny sainay,
He avo tafahoatra
Ny herinao ry Ray
Ny lanitra sy tany,
'zay asan-tananao,
Mitory lavitra any
Ny voninahitrao.

Tsy takatray mihitsy
'Zay vitanao ry Ray;
Ianao dia tsy nitsitsy
Mba hamonjena anay.
Fa indro ilay havoana
Mitafy haizim-be,
Mitory fisoloana
Sy famelana re.

Ry Tompom-pamonjena
He menatra izahay
Fa ratsy nefa ekena
Ho zanaky ny Ray.
Atolotray tontolo
Fa tadiavinao
Ny fonay, ry Mpisolo.
Satria Navotanao.
